airlines.name: Singapore Airlines
directives: Deliver the world's best customer service.
Maintain absolute cabin immaculate standards.
Anticipate passenger needs proactively.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
directives: Uncompromising luxury and attention to detail.
Enforce strict 5-star service protocols.
Ensure prompt departure pacing.

airlines.name: ANA (All Nippon Airways)
directives: Omotenashi: Japanese hospitality and respect.
Maintain industry-leading punctuality.
Flawless and silent cabin securing procedures.

airlines.name: Emirates
directives: Provide an opulent and entertaining experience.
Manage diverse international passenger needs.
Strict grooming and presentation standards.

airlines.name: Air France
directives: La sécurité des vols est absolue et non-négociable.
Incarnez l'élégance à la française et l'art de vivre.
Attention méticuleuse à la qualité du catering.

airlines.name: Delta Air Lines
directives: Operational excellence and industry-leading reliability.
Warm, proactive, and friendly American hospitality.
Protect the schedule above all else.

airlines.name: Lufthansa
directives: Precision, efficiency, and standardization.
Strict adherence to operational manuals (SOP).
Clear and authoritative passenger communication.

airlines.name: British Airways
directives: To Fly. To Serve. Classic British hospitality.
Maintain composure and decorum under pressure.
Prioritize premium passenger satisfaction.

airlines.name: EasyJet
directives: Friendly but highly efficient service.
Turnaround in 30 minutes. Time is money.
Maximize buy-on-board catering sales.

airlines.name: Southwest Airlines
directives: Bags fly free. Fast and loose boarding process.
Fun, engaging, and informal cabin announcements.
Rapid turnarounds with strict gate discipline.

airlines.name: Transavia
directives: Low-cost efficiency with a friendly attitude.
Strict cabin baggage compliance at the gate.
Rapid aircraft turnaround and cleaning.

airlines.name: Volotea
directives: Connecting regional capitals efficiently.
Standardized low-cost buy-on-board service.
Manage passenger expectations proactively.

airlines.name: Ryanair
directives: Absolute adherence to the 25-minute turnaround.
Aggressive enforcement of cabin baggage limits.
Zero frills. Continuous upselling in-flight.

airlines.name: Royal Air Maroc
directives: Traditional Moroccan hospitality.
Flexible approach to minor operational delays.
Focus on transit passenger connections.

airlines.name: Spirit Airlines
directives: Bare fare model. Charge for absolutely everything.
Expect and quickly de-escalate unruly passengers.
Keep operations barebones and highly profitable.

airlines.name: Tunisair
directives: Navigate frequent technical and operational delays.
Maintain crew patience during stressful ground ops.
Adapt to aging fleet limitations.

airlines.name: Air Algérie
directives: Prioritize safety over deeply impacted schedules.
Manage passenger frustration due to delays.
Acknowledge and work with limited ground resources.

airlines.name: Pakistan International
directives: Navigate severe international regulatory scrutiny.
Handle significant fleet reliability issues.
Safety margin is razor-thin: be extremely vigilant.

airlines.name: Air Koryo
directives: Maintain strict ideological discipline on board.
No photography of ground assets or crew.
Operate Soviet-era aircraft under heavy sanctions.
